shakshi: The runic trap activated in Castle Azoth — 0037 and 0041 converging in a single moment
The demonic iron rust-mercury poison on the spike tips did its work — what the spikes didn't finish, the poison did
Nexiott is dead — killed in his own house by the architecture of his own power turned against him
Kielum's most useful operative in Lapidus is dead — the war machine loses its human driver
He died where he believed he was safe — the trap is the punishment his architecture deserved
The player set the conditions, the trap fired, the poison worked — St. Alaro's pacifism constraint holds, telecom hijack intact
The Nexiott line of quests closes — the caravan empire without its architect
The infrastructure exists but the driver is gone — what happens to it propagates forward into subsequent games
What Alfir was taking back is taken — he may not say so, the player may not name it
